problem id: 31df43f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  01011100 -> 11110111
  11110111 -> 11111101
  10101011 -> 11111010
  11000111 -> 11111001
  01001111 -> 11111011
  10110000 -> 10101100
  01001101 -> 01111011
  01000001 -> 01011000
  10010110 -> 10110101
  01000000 -> 00010000

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 11011100
